description.value:
Your connection to the gravitational forces of copi allows you to temporarily alter gravity's effects on your body. You treat gravity as being one step higher or lower (for example, low gravity becomes standard gravity, or standard gravity becomes high gravity), but you can't Adjust Gravity to extreme or zero gravity. This only affects you, your gear, and your movement. This lasts until the end of your next turn if you adjust from extreme or zero gravity; otherwise, it lasts 1 hour, until you Adjust Gravity again, or until you enter an environment with a different gravity, whichever comes first.

At 13th level, you can adjust gravity to zero gravity or extreme gravity. At 17th level, you can lower or raise the gravity level by up to two steps.
